  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

BII

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 26
Func Name: UCBIC/BFR

  {
    "minbytes": 17,
    "sentbytes": "21C1",
    "name": "Etats du système",
    "deny_sds": [

      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "+ACC": {

        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4,

      },

        "bitoffset": 3,

      },

      },

  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "Identification",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Code fournisseur": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° calibration": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° pièce": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° version logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Version combiné": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
